query_spec.natural_query: VP Sales or Head of Sales at US cybersecurity SaaS startups in the United States

variants.query: VP Sales or Head of Sales at US cybersecurity SaaS startups in the United States
variants.rationale: Baseline: the natural query without any broadening.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Vice President of Sales" OR "Head of Sales") "cybersecurity SaaS" "United States"
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the title to include the full form 'Vice President of Sales'.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Sales Director" OR "Head of Sales") "cybersecurity SaaS" "United States"
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the title to include 'Sales Director' as a functional synonym.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Chief Sales Officer" OR "Head of Sales") "cybersecurity SaaS" "United States"
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the title to include 'Chief Sales Officer' as a C-suite form.
This variant broadens the industry to include general 'cybersecurity' without the SaaS specification.
This variant broadens the industry to include general 'SaaS' without the cybersecurity specification.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales") "cybersecurity software" "United States"
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the industry to include 'cybersecurity software' as an alternative to SaaS.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales") "cybersecurity SaaS" ("USA" OR "United States")
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the geography to include the abbreviation 'USA'.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales") "cybersecurity SaaS" "North America"
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the geography to include the regional term 'North America'.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales") "cybersecurity SaaS" ("California" OR "New York" OR "Texas")
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the geography to include state-level alternatives like 'California', 'New York', and 'Texas'.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales" OR "Sales Director") "cybersecurity" ("USA" OR "United States")
variants.rationale: This variant combines title broadening with industry and geography broadening, including 'Sales Director', general 'cybersecurity', and 'USA'.
This variant combines title broadening with industry and geography broadening, including 'Chief Sales Officer', general 'SaaS', and 'North America'.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales") "cybersecurity software" ("California" OR "New York")
variants.rationale: This variant combines industry broadening with geography broadening, including 'cybersecurity software' and state-level alternatives like 'California' and 'New York'.
